valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Sat 09 May 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Sun 10 May 2026
general_synopsis: Low just northeast of Faeroes 1002 expected Norwegian Sea 1004 by 1800 Saturday. Low FitzRoy 1005 moving slowly west, losing its identity by same time. Low just west of Trafalgar 999 slow-moving with little change
